name: In Salt Lake City, machine accident—comp or personal injury?
description: Comp primary; PI for third-parties in Utah[1].

mainEntity.name: In Salt Lake City, machine accident—comp or personal injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp primary; PI for third-parties in Utah[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers comp first; third-party PI if others liable.** Utah follows this[1][8]. **Key factors:** Exclusive remedy vs employer. **Practical guidance:** File comp, explore third-party. Local attorney knows nuances.
